DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Plaintiff NIKCOLE CUNNINGHAM, in pro per present.
Atty. PETER COWNAN, Esq. of City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3863) for Defendants.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' "renewed demurrer to plaintiff's first amended complaint" in Case No. CGC-23-608687 is overruled. However, case 608687 is stayed pending final resolution of Case No. CGC-20-587028. (OTO, LLC v. Kho (2019) 8 Cal.5th 111, 141 [court's inherent power to stay proceedings].)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2024 Continued To Mar-06-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-13-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Nickole Cunningham, in propria persona, Plaintiff.

PETER A. COWNAN, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, (415) 554-3863, for Defendants.

RE: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, M'KIA MCCRIGHT, KATRINA WILLIAMS, TRENT RHORER, DANIEL KAPLAN, MARIE-CLAIRE BALEA, MASSIEL GONZALEZ DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Not argued/contested. Counsel for Defendant requests that the deadline for the responsive pleading be extended to Jan-19-2024. Plaintiff does not object to Defendant's request. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar. Declaration of Peter Cownan indicates parties did not meet and confer by in-person, by phone, or by video conference, as required by CCP 430.31. Parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. The responsive pleading is now due by January 19, 2024.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
